---
name: 🧬 Physical Material Request (2018 Roots)
about: Form for corporate labs, academic institutions, and high-tier sponsors to request physical samples.
title: "[Material Request] - [Organization Name]"
labels: "Material Request"
assignees: usginger
---

### 🏢 Organization & Stakeholder Details
* **Full Legal Name of Institution/Company:**
* **Primary Researcher/Contact Person & Title:**
* **Official Website / Link to Lab Profile:**
* **Sponsorship Status:** [ ] Active GitHub Sponsor | [ ] Prospective Institutional Backer

### 🔬 Intended Research & Scientific Intent
* **Core Research Objective:** *(Briefly describe what you are testing for, e.g., metabolic stability, shogaol/gingerol profile mapping, etc.)*
* **Analytical Methods to be Used:** *(e.g., HPLC, Mass Spectrometry, GC-MS)*
* **Expected Timeline for Analysis:**

### 📦 Shipping & Logistics Parameters
* **Sample Type Requested:** [ ] Raw 2018 Sun-Dried Cubes | [ ] Processed Extraction Profiles
* **Approximate Mass/Volume Needed for Valid Sample Size:**
* **Shipping Country and Destination Postal Code:**
* **Are there specific import/customs regulations for botanicals in your region?** [ ] Yes | [ ] No
  *(If yes, please list any required permits or documentation you will provide)*

### ⚖️ Legal Framework Acknowledgment
* [ ] **I confirm** that our legal/compliance team has reviewed the [MATERIAL_TRANSFER.md](https://github.com) framework in this repository and agrees that all physical samples are provided strictly "AS IS" for experimental analysis with all liability assumed by the receiving institution.
